channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Systemic Failures in Municipal Services Highlighted in Khayelitsha and Langa
item.description: Residents of Khayelitsha and Langa have welcomed a damning report by public protector Kholeka Gcaleka, which validates longstanding complaints about inadequate municipal services. The investigation, l...

item.title: Susanna Reid jokes about Cat Deeley's outfit during live TV segment
item.description: During a live TV link between Good Morning Britain and This Morning, Susanna Reid made a lighthearted comment about Cat Deeley's off-the-shoulder dress, joking that 'it's so hot, Cat's dress is fallin...

item.title: Quebec Proposes Stricter Regulations on Benadryl Following Teen’s Death
item.description: Quebec is proposing new restrictions on Benadryl and other medications containing diphenhydramine as their sole active ingredient following the overdose death of an 18-year-old in 2023. The draft regu...

item.title: US-Iran Tensions Escalate Amid NATO Summit and Sanctions
item.description: The article details escalating tensions between the United States and Iran following a series of military strikes and sanctions. The US reimposed sanctions on Iranian oil sales in response to attacks ...

item.title: Cooperatives Bill and Its Impact on Kenya's Sacco Sector
item.description: The article discusses the potential risks and challenges posed by Kenya's Cooperatives Bill, which aims to centralize oversight of Sacco (Savings and Credit Cooperative) operations. It highlights how ...

item.title: Missing Cargo Plane Off Karachi Coast: Rescue Operations Underway
item.description: A private cargo aircraft carrying five crew members disappeared off the Karachi coast after losing contact with air traffic control during its flight from Sharjah. The Pakistan Airports Authority (PAA...

item.title: 'The Office': The journey from a temp agency interview to a global cultural icon
item.description: This article explores the remarkable transformation of 'The Office,' a British mockumentary series that originated from a real-life temp agency interview. Creator Ricky Gervais and writer Stephen Merc...

item.title: Impeachment Trial of VP Sara Duterte Enters Third Day
item.description: The Senate impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte entered its third day on July 8, 2026, with the House prosecution panel continuing to present witnesses and evidence against her. The Articl...

item.title: Prince Harry and Baroness Lawrence criticise judge's ruling in high-profile legal case
item.description: Prince Harry and Baroness Lawrence have launched a scathing critique of the High Court judge who ruled against them in their legal battle against the Daily Mail. In a 374-word statement, they accused ...

item.title: Switzerland advance to World Cup quarters after penalty shootout victory over Colombia
item.description: In a tightly contested World Cup match, Switzerland and Colombia played out a goalless draw in extra time before settling the tie via penalties. The Swiss team showcased remarkable defensive disciplin...

item.title: US Charges Gangsters in Hardeep Singh Nijjar Killing Linked to Transnational Crime Networks
item.description: The United States has charged Lawrence Bishnoi and Goldy Brar, along with 36 others, for their alleged involvement in the 2023 killing of Khalistani separatist leader Hardeep Singh Nijjar. The charges...

item.title: Analyzing Clickbait Tactics in News Titles: A Case Study
item.description: The article examines the use of sensationalist language in news titles, arguing that the original title employs clickbait techniques to attract attention. It highlights the debate around media respons...

item.title: Orlando Pirates seek attacking reinforcements to secure domestic dominance
item.description: Orlando Pirates, having already made several signings and released underperforming players, are now focusing on strengthening their attack to defend their lucrative domestic titles. The Betway Premier...

item.title: Daniel Radcliffe and Erin Darke's Long-Running Relationship and Family Life
item.description: Daniel Radcliffe and Erin Darke, who met while filming Kill Your Darlings in 2012, have been in a committed relationship for over a decade. Though not legally married, they share a strong bond and hav...

item.title: Startup Battlefield Australia Extends Application Deadline to July 20
item.description: TechCrunch's Startup Battlefield Australia has extended its application deadline to July 20, 2026, due to overwhelming interest. This extension provides late-stage applicants with a final opportunity ...

item.title: Six-Year-Old Boy Found Dead in Karachi After Alleged Sexual Assault and Murder
item.description: A six-year-old boy was allegedly sexually assaulted and murdered after being abducted from his residence in Karachi's Napier area. Police confirmed the arrest of Hamza, the victim's neighbor, who was ...

item.title: DepEd Implements Safety Measures and Psychological Support Following Campus Violence
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) has announced the implementation of active shooter drills in schools nationwide as part of enhanced safety protocols following recent campus violence incidents. Edu...

item.title: Preliminary Hearing for Tyler Robinson in Charlie Kirk's Murder Case
item.description: The article details the ongoing preliminary hearing for Tyler Robinson, accused of murdering conservative activist Charlie Kirk on a Utah university campus. Forensic evidence, including DNA samples fr...

item.title: New Rugby Laws Promote Open Play and Contested Matches
item.description: Springbok coach Rassie Erasmus has praised the latest rugby law changes, calling the resulting gameplay 'beautiful rugby'. The inaugural Nations Championship tournament saw 54 tries in the opening rou...
